sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91129" key="pternotrw/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτερνοτρώκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n91129.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Ham-nibbler</tr_>, name of a mouse in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29</biblScope> </bibl>; also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πτερνο-φάγος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Ham-eater</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:227" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">227</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
